name: components/tabs
description: An accessible tabbed interface that organizes content into mutually exclusive panels. Provides a complete composition system with Tabs, TabsList, TabsTrigger, TabsContent, and TabsIndicator. Supports both horizontal and vertical orientations, an animated selection indicator, and full ARIA tablist/tabpanel semantics. Built on Kobalte Tabs with arrow-key navigation and focus-visible rings.
useCases: Product detail pages switching between Description, Specifications, and Reviews
Settings pages with categorized tabs (Account, Security, Notifications, Billing)
Dashboard widgets that alternate between Chart, Table, and Summary views
Documentation sites with language or version switchers using tab triggers
usage: import { Tabs, TabsList, TabsTrigger, TabsContent, TabsIndicator } from "shadcn-solid-components/components/tabs"
